title: Upload Additional Files to File Gallery
excerpt: Is there a way to upload additional files to file gallery that are not captured in Files column? Sometimes we have a need to upload files that may not be tied to a specific task.

posts.author: dominique.matthews (Dominique Matthews)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to upload additional files to file gallery that are not captured in Files column? Sometimes we have a need to upload files that may not be tied to a specific task.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
You can either click the ‘Add File’ at the top left of the Files tab or the button in the middle?

image998×598 27.8 KB

posts.author: dominique.matthews (Dominique Matthews)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks @Clover_Gal - how did you get to that view? My files gallery does not show those options?

image1245×526 21.7 KB

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Looks like you’re using a files ‘widget’. There should be a tab ‘item’ called ‘Files’, that’s where I was

posts.author: Kristin (Kristin Moran)
posts.cookedHtml: I don’t see the “Files” tab. I do have the option to add a “File Gallery” view to a board.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: The files tab is ‘inside the item’. If you go into an item on the board you’re on then you’ll see a plus sign at the top where you can add a files view.

posts.author: Kristin (Kristin Moran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you!

Is there a way to put a file into the file gallery without attaching it to an item? Such as if a document applies to multiple items on a board.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
If you click on the three dots at the top, you can go to bard discussion which lets you attach files. However, the files put there do NOT show up in the boards files gallery. Which product (CRM/Work Management, etc) and level (Pro/Enterprise) do you have?

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com

posts.author: Kristin (Kristin Moran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Okay. I’ll mention that to the team.

We recently signed up for Work Management Pro.
